spells.name: Empower the Meek
spells.description: Double the power of each Common or Uncommon Game Card you played in this Challenge.
spells.rulesText: Double the power of each Common or Uncommon Game Card you played in this Challenge.

spells.name: Channel Group Energy
spells.description: Gain +5 power for each of your committed Game Cards in this Challenge.
spells.rulesText: Gain +5 power for each of your committed Game Cards in this Challenge.

spells.name: Tribal Spirits
spells.description: Add 2 random Game Cards to your face-up cards in this Challenge.
spells.rulesText: Add 2 random Game Cards to your face-up cards in this Challenge.

spells.name: Third Eye Awakening
spells.description: Gain +7 power and reveal one opponent's face-down committed card in this Challenge (if any).
spells.rulesText: Gain +7 power and reveal one opponent's face-down committed card in this Challenge (if any).

spells.name: Resonant Amplifier
spells.description: The next Invocation cast this Challenge has its primary effect doubled.
spells.rulesText: The next Invocation cast this Challenge has its primary effect doubled. Does not target another Resonant Amplifier.

spells.name: Confluence of Voices
spells.description: At Challenge resolution, gain +5 Ascension Power for each Invocation cast this Challenge.
spells.rulesText: At Challenge resolution, gain +5 Ascension Power for each Invocation cast this Challenge.

spells.name: Wisdom's Harvest
spells.description: Gain +2 Challenge TP for each Game Card remaining in your hand.
spells.rulesText: Gain +2 Challenge TP for each Game Card remaining in your hand (uncommitted cards reward wisdom).

spells.name: Inner Reflection
spells.description: Gain +1 AP for every 3 Challenge TP you have accumulated.
spells.rulesText: Gain +1 AP for every 3 Challenge TP you have accumulated. Converts teaching progress into power.

spells.name: Scholar's Focus
spells.description: Your committed cards with AP 5 or less each grant +3 bonus TP.
spells.rulesText: Your committed cards with AP 5 or less each grant +3 bonus TP. Rewards playing humble cards.

spells.name: Threshold Surge
spells.description: Gain +8 AP if you have crossed at least one TP threshold this Challenge.
spells.rulesText: Gain +8 AP if you have crossed at least one TP threshold this Challenge. +12 AP if two or more thresholds.
